problem.title: F-LOAM trade-off on KITTI Raw drive 0009 full sequence (443 frames, urban)
problem.question: Which F-LOAM profile on KITTI Raw drive 0009 full sequence (443 frames, urban)?

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.note: Fast feature-based odometry+mapping with thinned input and throttled mapping updates (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Thin input and throttle mapping for speed.
variants.note: Fast feature-based odometry+mapping with thinned input and throttled mapping updates (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Process denser input and update mapping every frame.
variants.note: Fast feature-based odometry+mapping with thinned input and throttled mapping updates (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
